en: What does she want with Josh anyway?
He dresses funny. He listens to Complaint Rock.
ko: 그는 웃긴 옷을 입고, 불평 록을 듣잖아.

en: He's not even cute.
In a conventional way.
I mean, he's just like this slug who hangs around the house all the time. Ugh.
ko: 그냥 집에 늘어져 있는 슬러그 같아. 으.

en: And he's a hideous dancer.
Couldn't take him anywhere.
Wait a second. What am I stressing about?
ko: 잠깐만. 내가 왜 이렇게 스트레스를 받고 있는 거지?

en: This is like Josh.
Okay, okay. So he's kind of a Baldwin.
ko: 알겠어, 알겠어. 그는 약간 볼드윈 같아.

en: What would he want with Ty?
She couldn't make him happy.
ko: 그녀는 그를 행복하게 할 수 없어.

en: Josh needs someone with imagination.
Someone to take care of him.
Someone to laugh at his jokes.
In case he ever makes any.
Then suddenly...
Oh my God.
I love Josh.
I am majorly, totally, butt-crazy in love.
ko: 나는 완전히, 정말로, 미치도록 사랑에 빠졌어.
